hero.label: Serenity Vegetarian Dining
hero.title: Serenely Savor the Purest Flavors
hero.subtitle: Hana offers a serene vegetarian dining experience, where you leave behind the daily chaos and savor every dish crafted from the finest ingredients.

intro.label: An Nhiên Philosophy
intro.title: Serene Vegetarian Cuisine For Your Moments of Peace
intro.description: At Hana, we believe plant-based cuisine can bring complete serenity. After the hustle and bustle of daily life, Hana is your place to let go, quiet your mind, and savor each dish crafted with heartfelt dedication — a serene feast for all the senses.

fresh.title: Fresh Produce
fresh.desc: Committed to using only hand-picked organic vegetables and herbs every day.

chef.title: Skilled Chefs
chef.desc: Our cooks bring deep expertise and a true passion for plant-based art.

quality.title: Best Quality
quality.desc: The highest standards in every step of preparation and presentation.

item1.name: Premium Truffle Mushroom
item1.desc: Truffle mushrooms, fresh garlic, green herbs

item2.name: Gourmet Fresh Rolls
item2.desc: Raw vegetables, rice noodles, organic hoisin

item3.name: Japanese Miso Tofu
item3.desc: Silken tofu, miso sauce, seasonal greens

service.title: Serenely Savor — Refined Dishes And Heartfelt Service From The Soul.
service.desc: Hana was built with a heart of good karma, wishing to bring serenity to every guest in every moment. Let us take care of you.

testimonials.quote: Hana is where I find true serenity in every meal. After hectic days, the space and food here help me let go of all weariness — an experience I will keep recommending to everyone I know.
testimonials.author: Minh Chau – Loyal Guest

About.title: About Hana
About.subtitle: Serenity in the journey of savoring plant-based cuisine.
About.philosophyText: At Hana, we believe every meal is a moment of serenity. After the hustle and bustle of daily life, Hana invites you to let go of all worries, quiet your mind, and savor each pure flavor. Every ingredient is carefully selected to retain its inherent natural beauty.
About.passionText: The owner built Hana with a heart of good karma, sending serenity to every guest. Nature is an endless source of inspiration — from the spatial design to the food presentation, we strive to recreate the rustic, serene beauty of plants and flowers in every moment you spend here.
